title: hypericum hyssopifolium subsp. lydium
intro: Hypericum hyssopifolium subsp. lydium, also known as the Turkish St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of the Hypericum hyssopifolium plant, a flowering perennial native to Turkey. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and infections. The health benefits of Hypericum hyssopifolium subsp. lydium include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antiviral activity, which can help alleviate symptoms of herpes and other viral infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
